PAGE_NOT_FOUND_MSG: This page got lost in the jungle.
TUT_WELCOME_DESC: Hi there! Orangutan here. I'll teach you about money. We'll play for 15 years. You'll learn to save, grow, and protect your money. Take it slow. No rush. Let's begin!
TUT_FUND_HINT: Every year, you get fresh money. Put it in different places. Like planting many trees, not just one!
TUT_INSTRUMENTS_DESC: New choices open up over time:
TUT_EMERGENCY_DESC: From Year 2, surprises happen. A broken phone. A sick pet. You'll need Rp 2,000,000 to Rp 4,500,000 to handle them. That's why we always save some money!
TUT_PAY_CASH_DESC: Use the money you have right now
TUT_SELL_INVESTMENTS_DESC: Sell one of your investments to get cash
TUT_OBJECTIVE_DESC: Grow your money as much as you can in 15 years. Be patient, like Orangutan!
TUT_COMPARISON_DESC: At the end, we'll compare your result with the computer's.
PORTFOLIO_EMPTY: Empty for now. Let's start planting some money trees!
DEPOSITO_ARO_TOOLTIP: Keeps growing when time is up
DEPOSITO_EARLY_TOOLTIP: Taking out early? You lose half the bonus!
DEPOSITO_ARO_COMPOUND_TOOLTIP: Your bonus grows on top of the last bonus!
MARKET_DEPOSITO_TIP: Lock your money for a while. Get a bigger bonus!
MARKET_BOND_TIP: Lend to the country. Get a reward every month!
MARKET_STOCKS_TIP: Prices change every 2 months. Yearly bonus too!
MARKET_CRYPTO_WARNING: Very wild! Can go way up or way down!
MARKET_CF_WARNING: Money is locked. Some projects fail!
PERF_CHART_EMPTY: Keep playing! Chart will appear soon...
INTRO_CONGRATS: Hey {name}! Orangutan found a new way to grow your money!
EVENT_CHOOSE_PAYMENT: How do you want to pay?
EVENT_GAME_OVER: Oh no! Not enough money to pay. Game over...
ARO_WHAT_IS_DESC: When your locked savings is done, this puts it right back in. Your bonus becomes part of the new savings. It keeps growing like a tree!
ARO_BENEFITS_DESC:
• Your bonus earns more bonus!
• You don't have to do anything
• Your money never stops growing
ARO_GAME_RULES_DESC:
• When time is up, everything goes back in
• Same time, same rate
• Turn it on or off anytime
• Taking out early still costs half the bonus
ARO_REGULATION_DESC:
• Most banks in Indonesia have this
• Your money is protected up to Rp 2 billion
• A small part goes to taxes
GAMEOVER_AI_STRATEGY: Computer's plan: 35% Fund, 23% Gold, 15% Locked Savings, 15% Bonds, 10% Stocks, 2% Savings
GAMEOVER_PLAYER_WINS: You beat the computer by Rp {diff} (+{pct}%)! Orangutan is proud!
GAMEOVER_AI_WINS: Computer was ahead by Rp {diff} (+{pct}%). Keep learning!
GAMEOVER_TIE: A tie! You and the computer are equal!
RATING_LEGENDARY: LEGEND! Orangutan bows to you. Amazing money skills!
RATING_EXPERT: EXPERT! You really know your stuff. Keep it up!
RATING_SKILLED: SKILLED! Strong work. You're getting really good!
RATING_DEVELOPING: GROWING! Good start. Keep planting those seeds!
RATING_LEARNING: Still learning. That's okay. Orangutan took years too!
RATING_TRY_AGAIN: Try again! Every wise investor started somewhere!
ERR_BUY_ASSET: Not enough money! Need Rp 1 million.
ERR_OPEN_DEPOSITO: Can't open locked savings. Check your cash!
ERR_BUY_BOND: Can't buy bond. Check your cash!
ERR_BUY_STOCK: Can't buy stock. Check your cash!
ERR_BUY_CRYPTO: Can't buy crypto. Check your cash!
ERR_BUY_CROWDFUNDING: Can't invest in project. Check your cash!
ERR_BUY_GOLD: Can't buy gold. Check your cash!
ERR_PAY_PORTFOLIO: Not enough to sell to pay.
MASCOT_WELCOME: Hi there! I'm Otan the Orangutan. I'll help you learn about money!
MASCOT_TIP_SAVE_FIRST: Try putting some money into Savings! It grows a little every month.
MASCOT_TIP_TOO_MUCH_CASH: Your piggy bank is overflowing! Try investing some of that cash.
MASCOT_TIP_DEPOSITO_UNLOCK: Locked Savings is open! Lock your money for a while to get a bigger bonus!
MASCOT_TIP_BOND_UNLOCK: Bonds are here! Lend money to the country and get rewards every month!
MASCOT_TIP_FUND_GOLD_UNLOCK: Index Funds and Gold are now open! Spread your money to more places!
MASCOT_TIP_STOCK_UNLOCK: Stocks are here! You can now buy pieces of real companies!
MASCOT_TIP_DIVERSIFY: Don't put all eggs in one basket! Spread your money to different places.
MASCOT_TIP_PATIENCE: Patience is the secret to growing money. Like a tree, it takes time!
MASCOT_TIP_EMERGENCY_FUND: Always keep some savings ready. Surprises can happen anytime!
MASCOT_TIP_FIRST_INVEST: Your first investment! Exciting! Watch it grow over time.
MASCOT_TIP_GOOD_DIVERSIFY: Great job spreading your money around! That's smart investing!
MASCOT_TIP_EMPTY_PORTFOLIO: Try buying something from the Market! That's how your money grows.
MASCOT_TIP_EARLY_INVEST: The earlier you invest, the more your money can grow. Start now!
MASCOT_TIP_COMPOUND: Did you know? When your bonus earns more bonus, it's called compound interest!
MASCOT_TIP_RISK_REWARD: Higher risk means money can grow faster, but it can also shrink. Be careful!
MASCOT_TIP_SAVINGS_SAFE: Savings is the safest place for your money. Good for emergencies!
MASCOT_TIP_GOLD_SAFE: Gold has been valuable for thousands of years. It protects your money!
MASCOT_TIP_EVENT_COMING: Keep some cash ready! A surprise event could happen soon.
MASCOT_TIP_STOCK_VOLATILE: Stock prices go up and down. Don't panic! Think long term.
MASCOT_TIP_CRYPTO_CAREFUL: Crypto is very wild! Only put in money you can afford to lose.
MASCOT_TIP_YEARLY_INCOME: You just got your yearly money! Think carefully about where to put it.
MASCOT_TIP_HALFWAY: You're halfway through! How is your money doing? Check your wealth!
MASCOT_TIP_FINAL_YEARS: Almost done! These last years really matter. Make them count!
MASCOT_TIP_BONDS_STEADY: Bonds give you a steady reward every month. Nice and reliable!
MASCOT_TIP_INDEX_FUND: Index Funds follow the whole market. A lazy but smart way to invest!
MASCOT_TIP_CROWDFUNDING: Crowdfunding lets you support cool projects, but some might fail!
MASCOT_TIP_CHECK_PORTFOLIO: Check your Treasure Chest! See how your investments are doing.
